# Unreal Engine 5.7 Documentation Corpus

This repository contains the complete Unreal Engine 5.7 official documentation converted to clean Markdown.

## Purpose

Provides 3,444 Markdown files scraped from Epic Games' official documentation site for use as LLM context, RAG pipelines, offline reading, and AI-assisted Unreal Engine development.

## Access via MCP Server (Recommended for Claude)

Install the bundled MCP server to give Claude direct search access:

```bash
pip install -e ".[mcp]"
claude mcp add --transport stdio ue5-docs -- python -m mcp_server.server --docs-dir ./docs-md-py
```

Available tools once installed:
- `search_docs(query)` — search by topic, class name, or keyword
- `get_doc(slug)` — retrieve full page content
- `list_sections()` — browse top-level categories

## File Organization

All documentation files are in `docs-md-py/en-us/unreal-engine/` as flat Markdown files named by slug.

Examples:
- `gameplay-ability-system-overview.md`
- `actor-communication-in-unreal-engine.md`
- `introduction-to-blueprints.md`
- `niagara-overview.md`

## Key Topics Available

- Gameplay Framework (Actors, Components, GameMode, GameState, PlayerController)
- Gameplay Ability System (GAS, Attributes, Effects, Abilities)
- Blueprints (Visual Scripting, Variables, Events, Functions)
- C++ Programming (Classes, Reflection, UFUNCTION, UPROPERTY)
- Rendering (Materials, Shaders, Lumen, Nanite, Post Processing)
- Networking (Replication, RPCs, Actor Relevancy, Network Roles)
- Animation (Skeleton, AnimBP, AnimMontage, IK, Physics Assets)
- Physics (Collision, Constraints, Chaos Physics, Vehicles)
- AI (Behavior Trees, Blackboard, Navigation Mesh, Environment Query System)
- Input (Enhanced Input, Input Actions, Input Mapping Context)
- Audio (MetaSound, Sound Cues, Attenuation, Submixes)
- UI / UMG (Widgets, Slate, HUD, Canvas)
- Tools (Niagara, PCG, Control Rig, World Partition, Level Instances)
- Platform (iOS, Android, Console, XR/VR/AR)
- Packaging and Distribution

## Navigation

- `docs-md-py/INDEX.md` — hierarchical page listing with links
- `GUIDE_INDEX.md` — numbered hierarchical index (1., 1.1., 1.1.1.)
- `GUIDE_BOOK.md` — entire corpus as single file (~30 MB, ~7M tokens)

## Metadata Format

Each Markdown file contains:
```markdown
# Page Title
> Source: https://dev.epicgames.com/documentation/en-us/unreal-engine/...
> Application Version: 5.7
[content]
```

## Source

Scraped from https://dev.epicgames.com/documentation/en-us/unreal-engine using the included scraper (`scripts/scrape_epic_docs.py`). Content copyright Epic Games, Inc.
